## Bug Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Upload file '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

A clear and concise description of what actually happened.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## Environment

- **Stirling-PDF Version**: [e.g. 0.22.0]
- **Deployment Method**: [e.g. Docker, Docker Compose, Local Build]
- **OS**: [e.g. Ubuntu 22.04, Windows 11, macOS 14]
- **Browser**: [e.g. Chrome 120, Firefox 121]
- **Docker Image**: [e.g. stirlingtools/stirling-pdf:latest]

## Docker Compose / Configuration

```yaml
# Paste your docker-compose.yml or relevant config here (remove sensitive data)
```

## Logs

```
# Paste relevant logs here
# Docker: docker logs <container_name>
```

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here.

## Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues to ensure this bug has not already been reported
- [ ] I have provided all the information requested above
- [ ] I have removed any sensitive information from logs and configurations
